ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suicide_rates" (
  "suicide_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suicide rate entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex (male/female) of the population */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., 15-24 years) of the population */,
  "suicides_no" INTEGER /* Number of suicides in the population */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "suicides_per_100k_pop" REAL /* Suicide rate per 100,000 population */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the age group */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the gender */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the generation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suicide_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suicide_rates_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suicide_rates_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suicide_rates_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES generations ("generation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suicide_rates_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "hdi" REAL /* Human Development Index (HDI) value */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) value */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita value */,
  "hdi_rank" INTEGER /* HDI rank of the country for the given year */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate for the given year */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate for the given year */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the given year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 15-24 years) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender (male/female) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generations" (
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generation */,
  "generation_name" TEXT /* Name of the generation (e.g., Generation X, Boomers) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the generation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission relationship */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., WHO, World Bank) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the dataset */,
  "key" TEXT /* Metadata key (e.g., collection_date, methodology) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Metadata value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_metadata_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
